item.title: Berkshire Hathaway operating earnings fell nearly 30% in Warren Buffett's final quarter as CEO
item.description: Berkshire Hathaway reported fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings on Saturday.

item.title: Khamenei's death raises questions about Trump's China trip
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has been scheduled to visit China at the end of March, following tense trade relations with Beijing.

item.title: Forget DeepSeek. China’s already released 5 new AI models and UBS prefers this one
item.description: While many Chinese companies have chased market share at home for consumer AI applications, UBS likes one in particular for its global enterprise pote...

item.title: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel vows to keep Buffett's culture of disciplined investing in first annual letter
item.description: Berkshire Hathaway's Greg Abel released his first annual shareholder letter as chief executive.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Bank stocks, Netflix, Duolingo, AES, Sunrun and more
item.description: These are some of the stocks posting the largest moves at midday.
